title: Sales Person
description: Find salespeople who did NOT have any orders related to the company named 'RED'.
constraints: sales_id is the primary key of SalesPerson
com_id is the primary key of Company
order_id is the primary key of Orders
A salesperson may have zero orders
Company name 'RED' is guaranteed to exist or may not exist — query must handle both
key_concept: NOT IN with multi-table subquery. Find set to exclude, then negate.

hints.L1: First find all salesperson IDs who have orders with 'RED'. Then exclude them from SalesPerson.
hints.L2: Subquery: SELECT DISTINCT sales_id FROM Orders o JOIN Company c ON o.com_id = c.com_id WHERE c.name = 'RED'
hints.L3: SELECT name FROM SalesPerson WHERE sales_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT o.sales_id FROM Orders o JOIN Company c ON o.com_id = c.com_id WHERE c.name = 'RED')
